name: Hot Soft Pretzels
recipeIngredient: cornmeal and extra flour for dusting
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine yeast, 1 1/2 teaspoons of brown sugar, and water. Let stand 5 minutes until foamy and bubbly.
2. Add the remaining sugar and salt to the mixture. Stir well.
3. Add the flour, 1 cup at a time, mixing by hand until well incorporated.
4. Knead dough until smooth about 7 minutes and has a sheen.
5. Transfer dough to a bowl and let stand, covered, for 40 minutes in a warm place.
6. Dust your work surface with flour and cornmeal. Divide the dough into approximately 12 pieces.
7. Roll out each piece of dough to the desired length and thickness (thinner will be crisper).
8. Form the rolled-out dough into pretzel shapes.
9. Place the shaped pretzels on a baking sheet lightly dusted with cornmeal.
10. Preheat oven to 425 degrees F.
11. Bring a large pot of water to a boil.
12. Carefully transfer the risen pretzels to boiling water using a spatula.
13. Boil each side for 2 minutes, then flip and boil the other side for 1 1/2 minutes.
14. Transfer boiled pretzels to a rack to drain for 1 minute.
15. Arrange pretzels on a baking sheet, lightly dusted with cornmeal, and sprinkle with kosher salt.
16. Bake for 20 minutes until golden brown.
Yield: 6 servings
